message:
fix(codegen): Improve core2 test pass rate to 87.5% (7/8)

Key fixes:
- Add __future__ module with CO_FUTURE_* constants for compile() flags
- Fix constant access: no & prefix for uppercase/CO_ prefixed names
- Fix unittest references in with.zig and assertions.zig to use runtime.unittest
- Fix tuple() type inference to return unknown for unknown inputs
- Fix compile() builtin to accept flags parameter

Now passing core2 tests:
- complex, finalization, longexp, int_literal
- extcall, exception_variations, compiler_assemble

Flufl test compiles but fails at runtime (BARRY_AS_BDFL not implemented).

files.patch:
@@ -17,9 +17,10 @@ pub const OpCode = enum(u8) {
     Pow,
 
     // Unary operations
-    Invert, // Bitwise NOT ~
-    UAdd, // Unary + (type check only)
-    USub, // Unary - (negate)
+    Invert, // Bitwise NOT ~ (0x53)
+    UAdd, // Unary + (type check only) (0x51)
+    USub, // Unary - (negate) (0x50)
+    Not, // Boolean not (0x52)
 
     // Comparisons
     Eq,

@@ -301,16 +301,17 @@ pub const BytecodeProgram = struct {
                 0x44 => .FloorDiv,
                 0x45 => .Mod,
                 0x46 => .Pow,
-                // Unary ops: INVERT=0x50, UADD=0x51, USUB=0x52
-                0x50 => .Invert,
-                0x51 => .UAdd,
-                0x52 => .USub,
-                // Compare ops: EQ=0x60, NE=0x61, LT=0x62, GT=0x63, LE=0x64, GE=0x65
-                0x60 => .Eq,
-                0x61 => .NotEq,
-                0x62 => .Lt,
-                0x63 => .Gt,
-                0x64 => .LtE,
+                // Unary ops: NEG=0x50, POS=0x51, NOT=0x52, INVERT=0x53
+                0x50 => .USub,   // NEG: unary minus -x
+                0x51 => .UAdd,   // POS: unary plus +x
+                0x52 => .Not,    // NOT: boolean not
+                0x53 => .Invert, // INVERT: bitwise ~
+                // Compare ops: LT=0x60, LE=0x61, EQ=0x62, NE=0x63, GT=0x64, GE=0x65
+                0x60 => .Lt,
+                0x61 => .LtE,
+                0x62 => .Eq,
+                0x63 => .NotEq,
+                0x64 => .Gt,
                 0x65 => .GtE,
                 // RETURN=0x88
                 0x88 => .Return,
